title: Finding the area of a rectangle
problem: Find the area of a rectangle with length $11$ cm and width $4$ cm.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for the area of a rectangle.
Substitute the length and width into the formula.

title: Finding the area of a triangle
problem: Find the area of a triangle with a base of $12$ cm and a perpendicular height of $5$ cm.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for the area of a triangle.
Substitute the base and height into the formula.

title: Finding the area of a composite shape
problem: A composite shape is made of a rectangle $7$ cm long and $3$ cm tall with a triangle on top. The triangle has a base of $7$ cm and a height of $4$ cm. Find the total area.

steps.instruction: Find the area of the rectangle using $A = l \times w$.
Find the area of the triangle using $A = \frac{1}{2} \times b \times h$.
Add the two areas to find the total area.
